title: DAV VAN - 211info
text: VETERANS BUNKER ST HELENS DAV VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rides to medical appointments. Appointments to approved Veterans Affairs (VA) facilities only. Volunteer opportunities are available. 125 S 13 Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: -Rides: Veterans -Volunteer: Must be 21 years old or older, have no moving violations in the past 5 years, and pass a background check. Other conditions may apply. Hours: Varies by appointment Email (503) 721-7804 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 721-7804 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule ride Visit website for information about volunteering FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VETERANS BUNKER ST HELENS
